arts.sum: Leeds United will be without the services of Pascal Struijk and Patrick Bamford this afternoon as they look to extend their advantage at the top of the Championship. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Ray Parlour can’t believe how Leeds hero is being treated
arts.sum: Leeds United had to make some tough decisions in the summer transfer window last year. After failing to win promotion to the Premier League, clubs from the top flight of English football came after their players and Leeds had no option but to sell them. arts.ttl: Seven Leeds United stars with uncertain futures ahead of January transfer calls
arts.sum: Leeds United and Daniel Farke expect a quiet month on the transfer front as they look to bounce back from last season's disappointing defeat in the Championship play-off final. It looks like Patrick Bamford's time at Elland Road could be coming to an end.

arts.ttl: Supercomputer reveals Leeds United, Burnley, Sunderland and Sheffield United's promotion fate
arts.sum: Fresh from beating Sheffield United on New Year's Day, Sunderland are predicted to secure the second automatic promotion spot. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: 25 ball losses: Daniel Farke may need to axe Leeds United favourite v Hull after NYD stinker
arts.sum: Leeds United make the trip to Hull City this weekend and changes are sure to be on the agenda for Daniel Farke after an underwhelming display on New Year’s Day, plus the quick turnaround between games. Leeds entered New Year’s Day top of the pile and looking to extend their gap over Burnley and Sheffield United, but missed the chance to create a five-point gap as they were pegged back late on by Blackburn Rovers.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery explains Aston Villa's Louie Barry transfer plan amid Leeds United and Sunderland links
arts.sum: After recalling Barry from his loan at Stockport County, where he netted 15 goals in 23 League One matches and topped the scoring charts above Birmingham City's Jay Stansfield, Emery faces a decision on the young forward's future. Unai Emery is set to take a close look at Louie Barry's capabilities before deciding the best path forward for the Aston Villa ace.

arts.ttl: Louie Barry Leeds United transfer latest after Aston Villa decision and Sunderland hint
arts.sum: One player that the Whites and other Championship clubs have been linked with is Aston Villa's Louie Barry. The youngster has just returned to Villa Park after a successful loan spell at League One side Stockport County.

arts.ttl: “Not a big dream of mine” – Midfielder appears to dismiss move to Leeds United under Daniel Farke
arts.sum: Leeds United currently find themselves top of the Championship table and in a very good position to go on and seal promotion to the Premier League. Of course, it won’t be the first time Daniel Farke has taken a team to England’s top flight, having done so previously with Norwich City. arts.ttl: Abu Kamara responds to Hull City critics at unusual press conference as Leeds United loom
arts.sum: Kamara was roundly criticised for his part in Middlesbrough's 93rd-minute winning goal on Wednesday night, along with skipper Lewie Coyle, allowing Delano Burgzorg to breeze into the Tigers penalty area before cutting the ball back for Alex Gilbert to slot into the net. Hull City winger Abu Kamara is determined to open his account for the club today when the Tigers host rivals Leeds United and respond perfectly to his critics.
